name_en: Caro Multicarry Double-Shoulder Money Bucket Backpack Series. New arrivals, exquisite imported lambskin craftsmanship, classic rhombus pattern, bucket bag silhouette, elegant yet stylish. Sliding chain design with dual-chain shoulder strap for single shoulder carry. Practical and beautiful, extra-large capacity design, perfect for holiday outings.
